name: Propagandist

abilities.name: Demise (New Convert)
abilities.text: Once per game. After this model is killed, if it does not have a Summon token, it may attach the Indoctrinated upgrade to another friendly non-peon model within 10".

abilities.name: Fury Factory
abilities.text: After a friendly model within 6" declares a (melee) action, that model may suffer 1 irreducible damage to receive a (+) to that action's duel.

actions.name: Vox-Amplifiers
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack receives a raise, attach the Brainwashed upgrade to the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Misdirected Rage
triggers.text: Target declares an attack action, chosen and controlled by this model. The generated action ignores engagement.

actions.name: Stoke Fears
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3" and it gains a Craven token. If this action did not receive a raise, this model may not declare this action again this activation.

actions.name: Revitalize
actions.effects: Remove a token from the target. If this action receives a raise, remove any number of tokens from the target.

triggers.name: Fake News
triggers.text: Once per turn. Discard up to three cards. For each discarded card, draw a card.

triggers.name: Cut Them Down
triggers.text: The target may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: Health bar shows numbered pips from 0 to 13, confirming 13 health
Keywords section after bullet appears empty
The melee icon in Fury Factory rendered as (melee)
